preview_rows.text: Results showed that rash impulsivenesswas a robust predictor of typical and problematic substance use.

Results suggest that the three novel facets of the UPPS-P modeladd little over a two component model in explaining substance use, although may provide preliminary evidence forthe utility of a revised global urgency construct in explaining problematic substance use.
Our results showed partial support for thesehypotheses

Researchers in this area may save testadministration time in future studies by not including thisscale.
